summary: Comprehensive testing of billing subscription lifecycle for managed subscriptions. All core flows verified working: cancel→pending→reactivate→active cycle, customer portal redirect, date/status presentation in Turkish. UI testing confirmed all buttons and states work correctly.

issues: Some console 500 errors visible during page load for non-billing endpoints (partners, etc.) - not affecting billing functionality

passed_tests: GET /api/billing/subscription - Returns managed_subscription=true for agent account
GET /api/billing/subscription - Returns provider_subscription_id=sub_* (real Stripe ID)
GET /api/billing/subscription - Returns provider_customer_id=cus_* (real Stripe ID)
GET /api/billing/subscription - Returns can_cancel=true, change_flow=self_serve
GET /api/billing/subscription - Returns Turkish interval_label (Aylık/Yıllık)
GET /api/billing/subscription - Returns ISO date format for next_renewal_at
POST /api/billing/cancel-subscription - Schedules cancellation at period end
POST /api/billing/cancel-subscription - Returns cancel_at_period_end=true and Turkish message
GET /api/billing/subscription (after cancel) - Shows cancel_at_period_end=true, cancel_message present
POST /api/billing/reactivate-subscription - Removes cancel-pending state
POST /api/billing/reactivate-subscription - Returns cancel_at_period_end=false and Turkish success message
GET /api/billing/subscription (after reactivate) - Shows cancel_at_period_end=false, no cancel_message
POST /api/billing/customer-portal - Returns Stripe billing portal URL (billing.stripe.com)
Frontend billing page loads with correct Turkish title 'Faturalama'
Frontend shows summary cards: Mevcut Plan (Starter), Sonraki Yenileme (08 Nisan 2026), Faturalama Durumu (Aylık · Aktif)
Frontend cancel dialog shows correct Turkish text
Frontend shows cancel-pending banner after cancellation: 'Aboneliğiniz dönem sonunda sona erecek'
Frontend shows reactivate button when cancel-pending
Frontend cancel button shows 'İptal planlandı' when cancel-pending
Frontend shows success toast after reactivation: 'Aboneliğiniz yeniden aktif hale getirildi'
Frontend removes cancel-pending banner after reactivation
Frontend removes reactivate button after reactivation
Frontend restores cancel button to normal state after reactivation
critical_code_review_comments: SUCCESS: stripe_checkout_service.py correctly manages real Stripe subscription lifecycle
SUCCESS: cancel_subscription_at_period_end sets cancel_at_period_end=true via Stripe API
SUCCESS: reactivate_subscription removes cancel_at_period_end flag via Stripe API
SUCCESS: _sync_subscription_document correctly syncs state from Stripe to local DB
SUCCESS: Frontend SettingsBillingPage.jsx correctly shows/hides reactivate button based on cancel_at_period_end
SUCCESS: Frontend correctly disables cancel button and shows 'İptal planlandı' when cancel-pending
SUCCESS: Focus/visibility refresh handlers reload billing data when returning from Stripe portal
NOTE: Legacy account testing skipped due to login rate limiting (300s cooldown) - guardrail code appears correct based on code review
context_for_next_testing_agent: Managed subscription lifecycle fully verified for agent@acenta.test. Account has real Stripe subscription (sub_1T8mlOFfKOFR3CQUxQLtfxD8) and customer (cus_U70mCLudNCbN9V). Cancel/reactivate cycle tested end-to-end via API and UI. Legacy account testing blocked by rate limiting but code review confirms guardrails are in place. Rate limiting on login is 300s cooldown per email - plan accordingly for automated tests.
